meaning: n.尊为神,神化,颂扬,崇拜,典范
examples: The Oriental in Bangkok is the apotheosis of the grand hotel.
So complete is van Gogh's global apotheosis that Japanese tourists now make pilgrimages to Auvers to sprinkle their relatives' ashes on his grave.
So now we have the full saga of our hero, from childhood trauma to grand apotheosis.
Here in this cool, traditionally tiled interior, the pastel de nata reaches its apotheosis.
